positive: An ornate, symmetrical illustration of a celestial river flowing through a mystical landscape. The central motif is a pair of stylized, intertwining crescent moons cradling a luminous globe, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and abstract, flowing astronomical patterns. The style is highly detailed neo-Victorian engraving mixed with Art Nouveau symmetry, using deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, rich golds, and stark obsidian blacks. Composition must be perfectly centralized and adaptable to garment repeating pattern. High contrast, clean lines, elegant silhouette, golden ratio composition, perfect print quality, suitable for screen printing.
